hints.title: Gentle nudge
hints.text: The three-letter word is on the top row.

hints.title: Direction clue
hints.text: Several longer answers snake around the center instead of reading straight across.

hints.title: Almost there
hints.text: The eight-letter answer starts from the bottom center and finishes in the middle-right cluster.

explanation: The June 26 Wend solution uses every open cell exactly once: ADD fills the top row, PLUS bends upward from the lower center, EXTRA climbs the right edge, CREATE turns through the center-left, PREMIUM runs from the upper middle into the left side, and POSITIVE starts at the bottom before ending in the middle-right cluster.
quickHint: Start with ADD on the top row, then look for PLUS near the lower center.
fastTip: Lock in ADD and PLUS first; their paths are highly constrained by the blocked corners.
commonMistake: Do not treat the seven-column board as a 5x5 or 6x6 grid. The June 26 puzzle is a 7x7 LinkedIn Wend board with blocked corner cells.
difficultyNote: Medium because the open center gives several plausible turns before the long words are confirmed.
